description: Immerse yourself in the world of literature with this email template, celebrating the birth of the great Bard himself. Perfect for news outlets, blogs, magazines, and events, this template is designed to honor one of the most influential English authors in history. It's ideal for commemorating this globally observed celebration, engaging your audience with content related to Shakespeare's life, his timeless books, and his impact on the literary world. Whether you're a literature enthusiast or simply looking to acknowledge this special holiday, this template will help you pay tribute to Shakespeare Day in a truly fitting manner.
short_description: Celebrate Shakespeare's birth with our unique email template, perfect for literature enthusiasts and English author fans. Ideal for news, events, or Shakespeare Day celebrations, this template captures the essence of the bard's world, promoting the love for books and literature.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
IN CELEBRATION OF

William

Shakespeare's

Birthday

Here are 7 Shakespeare things
 
 

N° 1

During his life, William Shakespeare wrote

37

PLAYS

 

N° 2

 

Born on April 23rd, 1564

Died on his birthday, at age 52

 

N° 3

To thine own self be true, and it must follow, as the night the day, thou canst not then be false to any man.

 

N° 4

Shakespeare had 7 siblings

7

SIBLINGS
 

N° 5

All the world’s a stage, and all the men and women merely players. They have their exits and their entrances; And one man in his time plays many parts.

 

N° 6

Shakespeare’s father made gloves for a living

 

N° 7

Some are born great, some achieve greatness, and some have greatness thrust upon them.

 
 

Want More Shakespeare?

Check out these books!

 

William
